result.stdout:
Description:
  Aspire to Kubernetes helper tool

Usage:
  AspireToKube.Cli [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  init      Initialize aspire2kube environment
  destroy   Cleanup K8S resources
  deploy    Deploy manifests to a local Kubernetes cluster
  generate  Prepare migration package (images + manifests)
  help      Show help and usage information for aspire2kube

commands.payload:
Description:
  Aspire to Kubernetes helper tool

Usage:
  AspireToKube.Cli [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  init      Initialize aspire2kube environment
  destroy   Cleanup K8S resources
  deploy    Deploy manifests to a local Kubernetes cluster
  generate  Prepare migration package (images + manifests)
  help      Show help and usage information for aspire2kube

result.stdout:
Description:
  Deploy manifests to a local Kubernetes cluster

Usage:
  AspireToKube.Cli deploy [options]

Options:
  --target <target> (REQUIRED)  Cluster type to deploy to: k3s or minikube
  -?, -h, --help                Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Cleanup K8S resources

Usage:
  AspireToKube.Cli destroy [options]

Options:
  -t, --target <target>  K8S Cluster (k3s or Minikube)
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Prepare migration package (images + manifests)

Usage:
  AspireToKube.Cli generate [options]

Options:
  --export-method <export-method>      Image export method: push | tar | skip. If omitted, script will prompt.
  --aspirate-output <aspirate-output>  Path to aspirate-output folder. If omitted, script will prompt.
  --image <image>                      Image name(s) to operate on (can be specified multiple times). If omitted, script will show interactive image selection.
  --docker-username <docker-username>  Docker Hub username. If omitted and export method is push, script will prompt.
  -?, -h, --help                       Show help and usage information

  --docker-username <docker-username>  Docker Hub username. If omitted and export method is push, script will prompt.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Initialize aspire2kube environment

Usage:
  AspireToKube.Cli init [options]

Options:
  -d, --distro <distro>      Linux distribution (ubuntu, debian, fedora, rocky, rhel, or auto-detect) [default: auto]
  -k, --k8s-type <k8s-type>  Kubernetes type (k3s or minikube) [default: k3s]
  -?, -h, --help             Show help and usage information

  -?, -h, --help             Show help and usage information
